nbaNews.title: Inside the end of the Ja Morant era in Memphis
nbaNews.summary: Morant is now the last man standing on a Grizzlies team that hopes to move on from him this summer.

nbaNews.title: Nuggets-Pacers to play in Mexico City next season
nbaNews.summary: The NBA is sending Denver and Indiana to Mexico City for a regular-season game Nov. 7, the league said Thursday.

nbaNews.title: LeBron looking forward to playoffs with Bronny
nbaNews.summary: LeBron James is looking forward to sharing the floor with son Bronny James in the playoffs when the Lakers face the Rockets.
